race.comment: MOON SWEEPER (7) gets a good pull at the weights and doesn't have to improve much to win this. Nailed late with the 62kg when a narrow second at Scone. Good map again and proven in the going. RED RAGS TO BULLS (12) frustrating mare who gets back in her races and needs plenty of luck. Deep into the prep and has a good record over this course and distance. Each way. HAMMOON SENSATION (6) massive run from the wide gate when he sat on the speed to finish fourth to AUTUMN KING at Scone. Well drawn and can figure prominently. SOLITARIO (2) hard fit for this and will appreciate the rain affected going. Caught the eye late when sixth over 1600m at Scone in Highway grade. Can take a hand in the finish. BRUTAL BELLE (15) in career best form and look for her late from the sticky gate.
